# Task: Store-cli timestamp auto-population + record-usage + collate cost aggregation

> Task ID: FORGE-S12-T04
> Sprint: [FORGE-S12](../INDEX.md)
> Status: ✅ committed
> Estimate: L

## Description

Three related tool-layer fixes: (1) store-cli write bug auto-populates real ISO datetimes when agent supplies date-only YYYY-MM-DD values; (2) new store-cli record-usage subcommand writes token-usage sidecars programmatically; (3) collate --purge-events aggregates cost data from event files into bug markdown artifact before purging.
